name: Seis
oneLiner: seis.com couldn't even keep their homepage alive long enough to be killed by Claude — they were pre-murdered by a missing index.html.

name: Finnt
oneLiner: Finnt.com couldn't even keep their homepage alive long enough to be killed by Claude — they speedran the apocalypse.

name: Ole
oneLiner: This company's website expired on Squarespace before Claude even got a chance to kill it — it speedran its own death.
